settings_language_description: Changes the interface language. The app will reload when you switch.
settings_path_banking_desc: Paths for bank account imports (CSV, OFX, PDF).
settings_path_exchange_desc: Paths for crypto exchange imports and CEX integration.
settings_path_wallet_desc: Paths for on-chain wallet and gas fee accounts.
settings_path_defi_desc: Paths for DeFi protocol accounts (Aave, Uniswap, etc.).
dialog_change_currency_desc: This will add {currency} to your currencies and use it as the base for all reports and exchange rates.
dialog_create_account_desc: Add a new account to your chart of accounts.
error_at_least_2_line_items: At least 2 line items are required
error_no_statement_data: No statement data found in file
error_404_description: We couldn't find the page you were looking for. It may have been moved, or the link may be broken.
error_generic_description: An unexpected error occurred. You can try going back to the dashboard.
demo_banner_message: You're viewing a read-only demo with sample data.
demo_settings_readonly_notice: This is a demo. Settings are read-only. To configure your own ledger, install dledger locally.
error_no_api_key: No API key configured. Set an Etherscan or The Graph API key in Settings.
error_import_in_progress: An import is already in progress
error_debits_must_equal_credits: Debits must equal credits for the entry to balance.
confirm_clear_exchange_rates: Are you sure you want to clear all exchange rates? This cannot be undone.
confirm_clear_ledger_data: Are you sure you want to clear all ledger data? This will remove all accounts, transactions, and currencies. Exchange rates, sources, and settings will be preserved. This cannot be undone.
confirm_clear_all_data: Are you sure you want to delete ALL data? This will remove all accounts, transactions, currencies, exchange rates, and reset settings. This cannot be undone.
empty_no_currencies_found: No currencies found. Create currencies first.
empty_no_defi_positions: No DeFi positions found. Import transactions from DeFi protocols to see positions here.
empty_no_defi_activity: No DeFi protocol activity found. Protocol accounts (e.g. Income:Aave:*, Income:Uniswap:*) are created during DeFi transaction import.
empty_no_issues: No issues detected in your ledger data.
ml_description: Using ML to suggest account categories for uncategorized transactions
chart_net_worth_desc: Asset + liability totals in {currency} over time.
empty_not_enough_chart_data: Not enough data for chart. Import transactions spanning multiple months.
empty_no_journal_entries: No journal entries yet. Create your first entry to get started.
report_trial_balance_desc: View all account balances to verify debits equal credits.
report_income_statement_desc: Revenue and expenses for a given period.
report_balance_sheet_desc: Assets, liabilities, and equity at a point in time.
report_gain_loss_desc: Realized capital gains and losses from lot disposals.
report_unrealized_desc: Unrealized gains on open positions valued at current rates.
report_portfolio_desc: Multi-account portfolio view across all tracked wallets.
report_defi_positions_desc: Overview of DeFi protocol positions across lending, borrowing, and rewards.
report_protocol_pnl_desc: Revenue and expenses broken down by DeFi protocol.
report_integrity_desc: Check ledger consistency and detect issues.
report_french_crypto_tax_desc: Art. 150 VH bis — Weighted average method for crypto-to-fiat dispositions.
empty_no_accounts_configured: No accounts configured yet. Start with a default chart of accounts, or add accounts manually.
empty_all_archived: All accounts are archived. Toggle "Show archived" above to view and restore them.
dialog_merge_account_desc: Move all transactions from "{source}" into "{target}", then delete "{source}". This cannot be undone.
error_segments_required: Must contain at least two segments (e.g. Assets:Bank)
error_pattern_amount_required: Account pattern and amount are required
toast_opening_balance_failed: Account created but opening balance failed: {message}
dialog_discard_desc: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to discard them?
dialog_reprocess_summary: {changed} of {total} transaction(s) would change. {unchanged} unchanged, {skipped} skipped.
dialog_ledger_import_desc: Import from ledger files (.ledger, .beancount, .journal, .hledger), a zip archive, or paste content directly.
toast_no_ledger_files_in_archive: No ledger files found in archive
import_csv_desc_upload: Upload a CSV file or paste content directly.
import_csv_desc_mapping: Configure how columns map to journal entries.
error_preset_transform_failed: Preset transform failed. Try manual mapping.
report_combined_value: Combined value across {count} wallet(s) as of {date}
empty_no_wallet_holdings: No wallet holdings found. Add etherscan accounts and sync transactions to see your portfolio here.
report_no_issues_detected: No issues detected in your ledger data.
report_click_run_checks: Click "Run Checks" to verify your ledger data integrity.
empty_no_lot_disposals: No lot disposals in this period.
empty_no_income_recorded: No income recorded in this period.
report_initial_cost_desc: Total EUR spent on crypto before your dledger data.
report_no_saved_report_for: No saved report for {year}. Consider generating it first for automatic chaining.
report_ready_to_generate: Ready to generate your {year} crypto tax report
report_compute_description: This will compute your taxable crypto-to-fiat dispositions using the Art. 150 VH bis portfolio-weighted formula.
report_no_prior_year: No prior year report — using initial cost of 0 EUR
report_missing_years: Missing reports for {years}. For accurate cost chaining, generate from the earliest year first.
report_delete_confirm_chain: The {year} report chains from this year's report. Delete anyway?
settings_general_desc: Currency, date format, and fiscal year settings.
settings_dark_mode_desc: Switch between light and dark theme.
settings_backup_restore_desc: Export or import your database file.
settings_portable_export_desc: Export all data (accounts, transactions, settings) to a portable .dledger file, with optional encryption.
settings_export_database_desc: Download or restore a raw SQLite database file (.db).
settings_import_database_desc: Restore from a .db backup file. This replaces all current data.
settings_ml_classification_desc: Use in-browser machine learning to auto-classify imported transactions.
settings_ml_enable_desc: Shows a "Classify with AI" button in import dialogs.
settings_ml_confidence_desc: Suggestions below this confidence are discarded. Higher = fewer but more accurate suggestions.
settings_ml_models_info: Models (~70 MB total) are downloaded from HuggingFace on first use and cached in the browser. Classification runs entirely in your browser — no data is sent to external servers.
settings_currency_asset_types_desc: Override the auto-detected asset type for currencies. This affects which rate source is used for exchange rate sync.
settings_external_services_desc: API keys and configuration for external data providers.
settings_dprice_desc: Dedicated price DB — syncs from ECB, CryptoCompare, DefiLlama, and Binance.
settings_dprice_integrated_desc: Uses a co-located database managed by the app.
settings_dprice_local_desc: Shares the database with the dprice CLI tool.
settings_dprice_http_desc: Connects to an external dprice serve instance.
settings_dprice_http_mode_hint: Using HTTP API mode. Configure the server URL below.
settings_dprice_api_key_placeholder: Optional — only needed for protected servers
settings_dprice_stale: Data is stale (last update: {date}, {days} days ago)
settings_dprice_no_data: No price data yet. Run a sync to populate.
settings_dprice_unavailable: Could not load dprice status. Is the database accessible?
settings_account_paths_desc: Customize the account paths used by future imports. Existing accounts are not automatically renamed.
settings_default_accounts_desc: Create a starter chart of accounts. Existing accounts are preserved.
settings_data_management_desc: Clear stored data. These actions cannot be undone.
settings_clear_exchange_rates_desc: Remove all synced and manual exchange rates.
settings_clear_ledger_data_desc: Remove all accounts, transactions, and currencies. Exchange rates, sources, and settings are preserved.
settings_clear_all_data_desc: Delete all accounts, transactions, currencies, exchange rates, and reset settings.
settings_development_desc: Debug tools (only visible in dev mode).
error_import_not_supported: Import not supported by this backend
confirm_import_db: Import "{name}"? This will replace ALL current data. This cannot be undone.
confirm_import_dprice: Import "{name}" as dprice database? This will replace the current price database.
settings_finnhub_hint: Get a free key at finnhub.io. Required for stock prices (AAPL, GOOG, etc.).
settings_coingecko_pro_hint: Using Pro endpoint (pro-api.coingecko.com). 500 req/min.
settings_coingecko_demo_hint: Get a free demo key at coingecko.com. Required for crypto rates. Fiat rates work without a key.
settings_cryptocompare_hint: Get a free key at cryptocompare.com. Optional fallback for crypto historical rates.
settings_defillama_no_key: Default crypto rate source (no key required)
settings_binance_no_key: Crypto rates via public API (no key required)
settings_etherscan_hint: Get a free API key at etherscan.io. One key works for most EVM chains.
settings_routescan_hint: Used for BSC, Base, Optimism, and Avalanche (free at routescan.io). Leave blank for keyless access (slower rate limit).
settings_thegraph_hint: Get a free key at thegraph.com/studio. Required for Uniswap pool enrichment.
settings_helius_hint: Get a free key at dev.helius.xyz. Required for Solana transaction sync (100k credits/day free tier).
ofx_desc_upload: Upload an OFX/QFX/QBO file or paste content directly.
qif_desc_upload: Upload a QIF file or paste content directly.
qif_unmapped_transfers: Map QIF transfer accounts to journal accounts:
report_no_lot_disposals: No lot disposals in this period.
report_no_open_lots: No open lots. All positions have been fully disposed.
report_no_budgets_configured: No budgets configured. Add budgets first.
report_no_budget_comparisons: No budget comparisons for this period.
empty_no_trial_balance_data: No data available. Post journal entries to see the trial balance.
empty_no_income_statement_data: No data available. Post journal entries to generate the income statement.
empty_no_balance_sheet_data: No data available. Post journal entries to generate the balance sheet.
journal_duplicate_description: Potential duplicate entries based on date and amount.
sources_import_files_desc: Import transactions from files. Drop a file or click to choose.
sources_online_desc: Sync data from exchanges and blockchains.
sources_evm_private_key_warning: dledger will derive the EVM address from it and discard the private material immediately. Your private key will NOT be stored.
sources_btc_private_key_warning: dledger will derive the public key from it and discard the private material immediately. Your private key will NOT be stored.
sources_understand_derive_address: I understand — derive address and continue
sources_understand_derive_pubkey: I understand — derive public key and continue
sources_paste_btc_placeholder: Paste address or xpub / ypub / zpub...
sources_sol_private_key_warning: dledger will derive the public address and discard the private material immediately.
sources_categorization_rules_desc: Match keywords in descriptions to auto-assign accounts during import. First match wins.
sources_transaction_handlers_desc: {count} protocol handlers active. All handlers are always enabled; the best match is selected automatically by scoring.
sources_api_enrichment_desc: Enable external API calls for richer transaction data (e.g., Aave interest rates)
toast_batch_complete_all_skipped: Batch import complete: all {count} files skipped (no new entries)
onboarding_welcome_desc: Your local-first portfolio tracker. Your data stays on your device — no account needed.
onboarding_base_currency_desc: All portfolio values will be displayed in this currency.
onboarding_account_preset_desc: Choose a starting account structure. You can customize it later.
onboarding_add_source_desc: Connect an exchange, paste a blockchain address, or import a file.
onboarding_source_added_desc: Add another source or continue to finish setup.
onboarding_done_desc: Your dashboard is ready. Add more sources anytime from the Sources page.
dialog_no_dprice_assets: No matching assets found in dprice
feedback_desc: Get help, report an issue, or share your feedback
feedback_missing_source_desc: My bank, exchange, or protocol isn't supported
feedback_source_type_title: What type of source is missing?
feedback_defi_chain_desc: Choose the blockchain family for your DeFi handler
feedback_source_human_desc: Ask us to add support for your source
feedback_source_diy_label: Create the plugin yourself with a LLM
feedback_missing_source_link: Can't find your source? Get help adding it
feedback_llm_title: Create a {type} plugin with an LLM
feedback_llm_desc_file: Copy the prompt below into your favorite LLM (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) and get working code back. You can attach your file to give the LLM concrete data to work with.
feedback_llm_desc_api: Enter the website URL below, then copy the prompt into your favorite LLM (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) to get working code back.
feedback_llm_whats_included_desc: The prompt contains the TypeScript interfaces your plugin must implement, a working example, and the registration boilerplate. Fill in the placeholders before sending.
feedback_load_warning: Only load code you trust. This runs with full app permissions.
feedback_contribute_title: Share your plugin with the community
feedback_contribute_desc: Other users might need the same source. If it works well, we can include it as a built-in plugin in a future release.
feedback_contribute_pr: Open a GitHub issue with the code
feedback_contribute_pr_desc: We'll review it and may include it as a built-in plugin
feedback_contribute_copied: Plugin code copied — paste it in the GitHub issue body
feedback_bug_desc: We don't collect any data automatically. Choose how you'd like to report:
feedback_done_desc: Your feedback helps make dLedger better.
settings_plugins_desc: Add, manage, or remove custom plugins.
settings_plugins_delete_confirm: Delete plugin "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
desc_balance_assertions: Verify expected balances at specific dates.
desc_unreconciled_items: Check items that match your statement.
empty_no_transactions: No transactions for this account yet.
empty_no_assertions: No balance assertions. Add one to verify expected balances.
dialog_backup_description: Your data is stored locally in the browser
dialog_backup_no_sync: dLedger does not yet support cloud sync. Your data lives only in this browser, on this device.
dialog_backup_ephemeral: Browser storage can be cleared at any time — by the browser itself, OS updates, or clearing cookies and site data.
dialog_backup_recommendation: We recommend exporting a .dledger backup at least once a week to keep your data safe.
report_french_tax_tax_due_on_gain: Tax due at PFU {rate}% on a gain of {amount}
report_french_tax_skipped_one: 1 sale skipped because portfolio value was 0
report_french_tax_skipped_other: {count} sales skipped because portfolio value was 0
report_french_tax_opening_balance_hint: If you held crypto before using dledger, add opening balance entries to establish your holdings before the first sale date. Without positive holdings, the tax formula cannot compute the cost fraction.
report_french_tax_total_pv_tooltip: Net taxable gain from all crypto-to-fiat sales in {year}
report_french_tax_total_fiat_tooltip: Total EUR received from crypto sales (sum of all C values)
report_french_tax_final_acq_tooltip: Remaining cost basis after all {year} sales, carries to next year
report_french_tax_portfolio_tooltip: Total crypto portfolio value at year end in EUR
report_french_tax_pfu_note_2025_plus: PFU rate: 31.4% (12.8% IR + 18.6% PS — CSG increase effective 2025). Prior years used 30% (12.8% IR + 17.2% PS).
report_french_tax_checklist_acq_cost_not: Acquisition cost noted for next year: {cost}
report_french_tax_checklist_complete: All done! Your {year} crypto tax declaration is complete.
report_french_tax_2086_section_desc: One row per crypto-to-fiat sale event. Column headers show Form 2086 line numbers.
report_french_tax_2086_tooltip_217_218: Lines 217-218: Sale price — total EUR received from the crypto sale
report_french_tax_2086_tooltip_212: Line 212: Total portfolio value in EUR at the moment of sale
report_french_tax_2086_tooltip_220_223: Lines 220-223: Total acquisition cost — cumulative EUR spent on crypto, minus prior fractions
report_french_tax_2086_tooltip_acv: Cost fraction: portion of acquisition cost attributable to this sale
report_french_tax_2086_tooltip_224: Line 224: Plus-value = C - (A*C/V). Positive = taxable gain, negative = loss
report_french_tax_2086_acquisitions_desc: Fiat-to-crypto purchases that contributed to acquisition cost (A).
report_french_tax_2042c_card_title: Form 2042 C — Plus-values et gains divers
report_french_tax_2042c_instr_gain: Enter the amount below in box 3AN on your Form 2042 C.
report_french_tax_2042c_instr_loss: Enter the amount below in box 3BN on your Form 2042 C (informational, no tax due).
report_french_tax_2042c_no_amount: No amount to report — no crypto-to-fiat sales with gains or losses.
report_french_tax_2042c_box_3an_instr: On Form 2042 C, section "Plus-values et gains divers", enter {amount} in box 3AN.
report_french_tax_2042c_box_3bn_instr: On Form 2042 C, section "Plus-values et gains divers", enter {amount} in box 3BN.
report_french_tax_2042c_pfu_explainer: The default PFU rate is {rate}% (12.8% income tax + {ps} social contributions). If your marginal tax rate is below 12.8%, opting for the progressive income tax scale (box 2OP on Form 2042) may reduce your tax. This applies to all your investment income for the year, not just crypto.
report_french_tax_2042c_c2c_note: Crypto-to-crypto exchanges are not taxable events under Art. 150 VH bis. Only sales from crypto to fiat currency (EUR) trigger taxation.
report_french_tax_3916bis_penalty_full: 750 EUR penalty per undeclared foreign account (1,500 EUR if balance exceeds 50,000 EUR)
report_french_tax_3916bis_dac8_info: With DAC8 in effect since January 2026, platforms report automatically — omissions are easily detected.
report_french_tax_3916bis_no_accounts_hi: If you have accounts on foreign platforms (Binance, Coinbase, Kraken, etc.), you must declare them on Form 3916-bis. Add exchange accounts in Sources to track them here.
report_french_tax_3916bis_section_desc_o: 1 account to declare on Form 3916-bis for {year}
{count} accounts to declare on Form 3916-bis for {year}
report_french_tax_3916bis_other_card_des: Platforms supported via CSV/PDF import — look up details for manual declaration.
report_french_tax_3916bis_foreign_bank_n: Foreign bank accounts holding crypto (e.g., N26, Revolut) may also require a 3916-bis declaration if the bank is headquartered outside France. Self-custody wallets (hardware wallets, Metamask, etc.) do not need to be declared.
report_french_tax_stale_upstream: The initial acquisition cost has changed since the {year} report was generated — consider regenerating.
report_french_tax_stale_downstream: The {nextYear} report may be stale — its prior acquisition cost differs from the new {year} final value. Consider regenerating it.
